positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric representation of a roaring lion's head, emerging from an abstract pattern of celestial bodies and constellations. The style should be inspired by Art Deco and sacred geometry, rendered as clean, thick-lined silhouettes and negative space patterns. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep midnight blue, burnished gold, and crisp white. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for seamless print scalability, creating a symmetrical, powerful emblem suitable for t-shirt prints. The lines should be crisp and graphic, with a focus on strong positive and negative space.
negative: blur, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, logo, messy, faded, amateur, out of focus, extra limbs, bad anatomy
